73622.subject: 📈 Equity futures hit new highs
73622.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $77,125 (-0.1%) | **ETH** $2,119 (0.4%) | **SOL** $85 (-0.6%)

* [Tensions rise](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2059176714668777879?s=20) in Iran after [peace talks got close](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2058821098989322321?s=20) over weekend

* S&P futures [hit ATH](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2058681496223855027?s=20)

* Bitcoin ETFs post [worst week of outflows](https://x.com/Tyler_Did_It/status/2059227700305227851?s=20) in 2026

* BitGet launches “Reality” [RWA platform](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2059226405456728336?s=20)

* Ondo Finance founder [passes away](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2059097030434419146?s=20)

* Saylor hints at [bond purchases](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2058567425214369984?s=20) rather than Bitcoin buys this week

* [20-30 gunshots](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2058310133747474862?s=20) heard outside of the White House

* Hyperliquid launches [Canonical Prediction Markets](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2059116825359876130?s=20) — Launches [CPI prediction market](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2058892795994066982?s=20)

* Grok [Build beta](https://x.com/xai/status/2058973760708091907?s=20) goes live

* Bitmine is [on list](https://x.com/fundstrat/status/2058072346204741658?s=20) for Russell 1000 inclusion

* Ferrari equity falls 5% after they unveil a [new electric vehicle](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/26/ferrari-stock-shares-luce-electric-vehicle-ev-launch.htm)

* The [“buy crypto” search term](https://x.com/rektmando/status/2059025666851418272?s=20) on Google trends hits local highs

* Anthropic and White House near deal for [spy agencies](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2058210835315511407?s=20) to use AI tools

* Pope Leo XIV releases [encyclical letter on AI](https://x.com/Pontifex/status/2058888313029685400?s=20)

* China [prohibits travel](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2059188403002916984?s=20) for top AI workers

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/equity-futures-hit-new-highs

The global crypto market cap is
$2.58T
this morning. BTC climbed to $77,500 overnight as prediction
market odds for a US-Iran peace deal rose sharply over the
weekend, lifting risk appetite across markets. Oil fell more than
5% and gold ticked higher as traders repriced geopolitical risk.

The weekend brought selective momentum. Some altcoins outpaced
BTC significantly while the majors consolidated. Capital rotation
out of Bitcoin ETFs and into newer products is becoming a clearer
trend. The week ahead carries key macro data that could push
prices decisively in either direction.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

NEAR Just Jumped as Cross-Chain Volume Hit a New Record

NEAR Protocol climbed 15% over 24 hours on May 25, extending
a 30-day rally of roughly 90%. NEAR Intents, the network's
cross-chain transaction product, has processed over $19 billion
in cumulative volume and generated approximately $32 million in
fees.

Arthur Hayes named NEAR alongside HYPE and ZEC as his current
top trio.

How does NEAR Intents execute cross-chain swaps on behalf of
users?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/bU14t44w55wniD6fQ0JWiA~~/AAQRxRA~/UCmX6o4JENB0MBpVrNlOyJJmaIzG6Le8K4tOB0PBORh6L-ZDsxK6R4ilVTDCK449PtUEUZXGUBMSPYUSymQbHjzELEp1h8Kw8V9JXfJDgnqFJvG6yAbhg4fSWhJJPsgjxyONuy7BHW0kfxE5GuMbQZjlNIjNYgZB9MkzpZV9mAc~ )
   Crypto Prices Rose Overnight as Peace Deal Odds Climbed

Bit

73612.subject: Reminder: Acceptance of Autopay Mobility Terms of Use Required
73612.body:
Autopay [https://mailing.autopay.eu/email_marketing_click.html?x=a62e&co=Sn3P&lc=o7&mc=o&s=pT7j&u=t&z=goaOWQg&] 
Reminder: Acceptance of Autopay Mobility Terms of Use Required





Dear Autopay customer,

We would like to inform you about the new terms of use for Autopay Mobility, covering changes to billing rules and an expanded range of available services.






What do you need to do?
To continue using paid services in the Autopay app, please accept the new Price List.
Until your consent is provided, automatic services (e.g. motorway tolls, automatic parking) will be suspended.

I accept the new terms [https://app.autopay.pl/regulation-acceptance/8e52ddc72cb34af597e041e6e01c8bae] 




What is changing?

We are expanding the range of services
We are launching city parking payments in over 100 cities in Poland via the Autopay app.
Pay for parking with one click - no cash, no parking meters, and no need to remember to extend your parking time. All charges and billing history will be available in one place together with your other Autopay services.

We are standardizing billing rules for all users
From that date, service fees will be charged regardless of the number of vehicles added. The current rules that excluded fees for accounts with one vehicle will no longer apply.

We are adjusting the invoice delivery method for business users
We have introduced changes to how invoices are delivered to business users so that the process complies with applicable legal regulations and the requirements of the National e-Invoicing System (KSeF).





The full content of the new terms of use can be found in the Terms and Conditions [https://mailing.autopay.eu/email_marketing_click.html?x=a62e&co=Sn3P&lc=om&mc=o&s=pT7j&u=t&z=gaAv3S0&] and Price List [https://mailing.autopay.eu/email_marketing_click.html?x=a62e&co=Sn3P&lc=oJ&mc=o&s=pT7j&u=t&z=g8v28je&].
Please also note that in connection with the change to the Autopay terms of use, as a consumer you have the right to terminate the agreement in accordance with the rules set out in the Terms and Conditions.
If you have any questions about these changes, please visit the Help section or contact our support team.





Best regards,
Autopay Team


This message has been sent in accordance with the Autopay terms and conditions, by Autopay Mobility Sp. z o.o. with its registered office in Sopot, ul. Powstańców Warszawy 6, 81-718 Sopot, registered in the District Court Gdańsk-Północ, 8th Commercial Division of the National Court Register under No. 0000794787, NIP 527-28-98-696, REGON 383879060. Share capital PLN 19,296,050.00. If you are not the intended recipient of this message, please notify us and delete the message without opening any attachments.



Aby się wypisać przejdź do:
https://mailing.autopay.eu/unsubscribe.html?x=a62e&co=Sn3P&m=tY&mc=o&s=pT7j&u=t&z=gnBioPS&

73274.subject: Svadobná výzdoba
73274.body:
Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,

Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný a veľmi
radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍

Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v Rozhanovciach
(kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú výzdobu a na základe
toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste mali záujem prosím
navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo aby sa časovo radi
prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či Prešova, radi si s
Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas, ktorý by Vám
vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných hodinách. 🙂
Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme stretnutia sa
radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️

Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.

S pozdravom

Lenka Gattiker,
Vaša osobná posh asistentka

73231.subject: From a Cornell Lab to BlackRock. The Avalanche Story. | One Block Weekly #11
73231.body:
Hello,

Welcome back to One Block Weekly. One coin, one story.

While most blockchains were still arguing about speed, one quietly went and built a different kind of network altogether.

🏔️ Avalanche (AVAX)

Emin Gun Sirer is a Cornell University computer science professor who had been researching distributed systems long before most people knew what a blockchain was.

In 2018, his team published a whitepaper introducing a new consensus mechanism, a way for a network to agree on what is true, that was faster and more scalable than anything Bitcoin or Ethereum used. They called it Avalanche.

Ava Labs was founded to build a blockchain around it. Avalanche launched its mainnet in September 2020, raised $230 million in a public token sale in 48 hours, and immediately positioned itself as the platform serious institutions would eventually choose.

The pitch was simple: all the programmability of Ethereum, none of the congestion.

⚡ A Few Moments That Shaped Avalanche

2021 - AVAX surged over 2,700% in a single year, hitting an all-time high of around $147. Developers flooded in, and Avalanche briefly became the fourth largest blockchain by total value locked.

2022 - Avalanche partnered with Deloitte to build a disaster relief reimbursement platform for US government agencies. A blockchain landing a Big Four accounting firm and a government contract in the same deal was a first.

2023 - The subnet model gained traction. Major institutions, including financial firms and gaming companies, began launching their own custom blockchains, called subnets, built on top of Avalanche infrastructure.

2024 - BlackRock and other asset managers began tokenising real-world assets on Avalanche, bringing government bonds and funds onto the blockchain. Institutional adoption had moved from talk to action.

🔢 What Makes It Different

Avalanche finalises transactions in under two seconds, faster than almost any major blockchain. But the more interesting feature is subnets: custom blockchains that can be spun up within the Avalanche ecosystem, each with its own rules, validators, and token economics.

For institutions that want the benefits of blockchain without sharing space with memecoins and DeFi protocols, that is a compelling offer.

🤯 Three Weird Avalanche Facts

The founder once publicly exposed a flaw in a rival blockchain. Emin Gun Sirer identified and disclosed a critical vulnerability in Bitcoin's network years before Avalanche existed. He is one of the few people in crypto who arrived with an academic reputation already intact.

A major gaming subnet launched and went quiet. One of the highest profile early subnets was built for a blockchain gaming ecosystem. It launched with significant fanfare and struggled to find its audience, becoming an early lesson in the gap between institutional infrastructure and consumer adoption.

The whitepaper was published anonymously. The original Avalanche consensus paper was released und
